full_text:
Liu Zheng 劉政
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Zheng (劉政). Administrator of Youbeiping. Killed in the rebellion of Zhang Chun and Zhang Ju. Liu Zheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Zheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
